raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a charge of {$87.00} ( merchant : XXXX ) which was charged on my American Express card. This charge was disputed twice but American Express continued to deny the dispute. I had explained several times to American Express that the package was delivered to the wrong place ( it was delivered to the complex club house which was several minutes walk from my apartment ). I had provided photos as proof that it was delivered to the club house and not my individual apartment but American Express keeps siding with the merchant and claims that it was delivered. There is even a sign at the clubhouse stating not to leave packages there and the delivery driver failed to read the sign. Another concern is that I feel I may be a victim of delivery brushing and/or fraud but American Express didnt care to investigate. The merchant, XXXX, does not list a company address on their website and does not list a telephone number for customers. Despite explaining the lack of contact information to American Express, the dispute continued to be denied. I attempted to email XXXX several times with proof attached that it was delivered to the wrong place but I never received the results of their investigation. Please note that I am a loyal American Express customer who has a 100 % on time payment history and excellent XXXX XXXX. However I have had tremendous difficulty with this dispute.
